echolocation_leakage_C3.note: Clips are 16 kHz; echolocation peak energy (>>8 kHz) is absent by construction. This addresses residual low-band transients only.

interpretation: If aves2_embeddings >> call_rate_only and >> lowlevel_acoustic_only, the decode reflects call STRUCTURE, not rate or loudness (rules out C1, C2).
If aves2_after_dropping_clicklike stays high, the decode is not carried by click-like transients (addresses C3).
